title: NoPumpkinBlur
body:
# NoPumpkinBlur

**Subscribe to my free WhatsApp channel for exclusive updates on my projects:** [View and subscribe to the channel!](https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbCi9E30G0XfUg7TnF1i)

<details>
<summary>ENGLISH</summary>

## NoPumpkinBlur
This resource pack removes the annoying pumpkin blur and makes them transparent.

</details>


<details>
<summary>DEUTSCH</summary>

## NoPumpkinBlur
Dieses Resourcenpacket entfernt die nervige Pumpkin-Blur und macht sie durchsichtig.

</details>


<details>
<summary>ESPAÑOL</summary>

## NoPumpkinBlur
Este paquete de recursos elimina el molesto efecto de desenfoque de la calabaza y la vuelve transparente.

</details>

<details>
<summary>FRANÇAIS</summary>

## NoPumpkinBlur
Ce pack de ressources supprime le flou gênant des citrouilles et les rend transparentes.

</details>

**Check out my other texture packs:**
- [Colorful HUD](https://modrinth.com/collection/OkM0Spdl/)
- [OUTLINED GLOWSTONE](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flixflax-outlined-glowstone)
- [BetterWool](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flixflax-betterwool/)
